content:
I'm experiencing a memory leak that's only happening on a real phone, but not on an emulator. Using kmemleak, I see lots and lots and lots of different calls into Box::try_new from many different callsites. It looks like all/most frees from Rust are failing.

Any ideas what could cause this? I'm using https://android-review.googlesource.com/c/kernel/common/+/2753373
I guess there are some changes to the allocator files in those patches...
Yeah, I think I figured it out.
Apparently 1.72 removes box_free and puts it in the destructor instead.

Yeah, please feel free to try the 1.72.0 ones I sent to the list, which do have the Drop change (I will apply them today or so to rust-next, by the way, but using 1.72.1 since that got released meanwhile -- no changes to alloc).
